title: Switch Codex execution-root skill lookup to the split source roots
description: Update `skills.py` so allowlisted subagent-only skill IDs resolve from `templates/skills/`, operator-only exceptions continue resolving from repo-root `.agents/skills/`, and copied execution-root destinations remain unchanged under the backend skills directory.
acceptance_criteria: `prepare_isolated_execution_root()` continues copying allowlisted Codex skills into `exec_root/.agents/skills/` for the Codex backend.
Subagent-only skills are sourced from `templates/skills/` and `memory` continues to resolve from repo-root `.agents/skills/`.
Allowlist behavior and metadata remain intact, with no runtime discovery change for subagents beyond the repository source lookup.
